arts.ttl: Premier League release statement after Bournemouth star avoids red card for hair pull
arts.sum: Bournemouth star David Brooks escaped a red card in Tuesday's clash with Chelsea at Stamford Bridge following an incident with Marc Cucurella and the Premier League have now broken their silence

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer embarrasses Bournemouth goalkeeper with OUTRAGEOUS piece of skill as he reaches Premier League landmark with opening Chelsea goal against the Cherries
arts.sum: The Blues have failed to win any of their last four league matches, but made a fast start at Stamford Bridge as Palmer was played through on goal by Nicolas Jackson.

arts.ttl: Why David Brooks Wasn't Sent Off During Chelsea vs Bournemouth
arts.sum: Brooks collided with Marc Cucurella off the ball - but was allowed to stay on the pitch after a length VAR review.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News Today: Nkunku SWAP DEAL, Veiga BOMBSHELL, Chalobah TRUTH
arts.sum: FootballTransfers runs through all the latest Chelsea transfer news, rumours and gossip, including updates on Christopher Nkunku, Mathys Tel, Renato Veiga and Trevoh Chalobah . Chelsea Transfer News Today: Nkunku SWAP DEAL, Veiga BOMBSHELL, Chalobah TRUTH

arts.ttl: Chelsea's Renato Veiga makes 'permanent transfer decision' amid Borussia Dortmund links
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Renato Veiga is reportedly only willing to entertain a loan departure amid interest from Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea could still beat Manchester United to £42m signing even though he rejected Blues move last summer
Who is Chelsea target Mathys Tel? Signed for £25m by Bayern Munich aged 17, the forward has been mentored by Harry Kane and is dating a Miss Universe candidate
arts.sum: Tel has been a long-term target for the Blues, with the 19-year-old having been viewed as one of the best young forwards in the game, having been snapped for £25m by Bayern in 2022.

arts.ttl: Brentford v Manchester City, Chelsea v Bournemouth: Premier League – live
arts.sum: News from Tuesday’s 7.30pm GMT kick-offs and beyond Live scores | Latest table | Premier League top scorers The Manchester City players will wear black armbands tonight in tribute to the legendary Tony Book, their former captain and manager, who has died aged 90. There’s no Kyle Walker in the Man City squad. Here’s Jonathan Liew on why the career of one of England’s greatest right-backs is ripe for reappraisal. Based on media footprint alone, Walker might well be one of the most chronicled English footballers of the past decade, and largely for issues unrelated to anything he did in a defensive transition. Search the internet for this player of 93 England caps and pretty much every medal at club level and you will be deluged with various keyword-rich morsels of celebrity gossip swimming in pound signs, house prices and gigantic photos ripped from Instagram. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Bournemouth - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as the Blues bid to get back to winning ways - plus updates from Brentford vs Man City and more
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport live blog for the latest live score, team news and updates from this evening's 7:30pm kickoff games including Chelsea vs Bournemouth, West Ham vs Fulham and Brentford vs Man City.

arts.ttl: 'More comfortable': Mathys Tel's comments make his position in Enzo Maresca's Chelsea lineup obvious
arts.sum: The Blues want to bring him in this month.
